title: Cirrus: Enable AppArmor build and test
body:
This was specifically disabled early on in transitioning to cirrus due to
an excessive number of test failures and lack of knowledge.  This commit
reverses the stance and unifies build and test commands across all
current platforms.

Ref: [Open Issue](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/2223)

comments.body: @cevich I repushed to fix the format error. Can you rebase?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I rebased the other PR on this one here (see https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2224). I still have some time before the east coast is awake and hope to get it green before :)
@vrothberg yep, np.  With two PRs, and at least one idiot-driver behind the wheel, something will cross the finish line :rofl:
okay, this should be good to go.  I will follow up separately with lokesh to make sure we're packaging runc with the apparmor flag for ubuntu.
